title: task
description: cbor.rs:242 - dec_f64() only accepts 0xfa (float32) and 0xfb (float64), rejecting integer-encoded values. SenML v/bt/t fields are JSON numbers which CBOR encodes as integers when no fractional part. A peer encoding {'n':'temp','v':23} as CBOR integer (0x17) causes decode() to fail with InvalidInput. Fix: dec_f64 should also handle major types 0 (positive int) and 1 (negative int), converting to f64.
close_reason: Already fixed: dec_f64 already handles CBOR types 0 and 1 at lines 324-327, with tests dec_f64_accepts_cbor_integers and decode_record_with_integer_value confirming functionality
